raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>, I was at dinner when incident happened. I got a lot of alert and phone call from my bank that someone was trying to use my card and purchased many different transaction with same store in XXXX which I was not present in that state and I last purchased was in XXXX XXXX that day on XXXX. I am very disappointed how CITI handle the situation and not to protect me. I did not have any card to pay for that night and I am stuck without no card for next few days which I requested to be send out next day because I need to make a lot of purchases. I am stuck with no help from my bank or helping in handling the situation to make it better. The customer service has done terrible not to apologize for the situation. I would like to speak with XXXX from Citi bank. I am stuck I can not do any shopping or pay bills or pay anything without the card in my possession. It is not right I trust you to protect me and ability to use card and now I am stuck with nothing. I was supposed to buy some of stuff was on SALE and the sale ends on XXXX. I am stuck and I have no card to make any purchases. You CITI people destroyed me and it is not right. I need my card immediately and they told me it will be send out asap. Now I spoke to customer service on XXXX. They said don't send out on Sunday and I am frustrated and not what I was promised. I would like to communicate through email.
